title: Oil extends declines as OPEC looks to phase out supply cuts
section_path: Oil extends declines as OPEC looks to phase out supply cuts
section_path_text: Oil extends declines as OPEC looks to phase out supply cuts
summary:
Main
Easing supply side issues triggered falls across the commodity complex, despite rising prospects of rate cuts. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-06-05 102326.png | assets/2024-06-05_enypt0pu0gihyoyvad0cui9zv9t4jf_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_f1c7ac0201fa.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil extended recent declines, as OPEC plans to phase out voluntary output cuts, deepened the market's bearish sentiment. The weekend's meeting between OPEC and its allies saw the group extend its formal production agreement until the end of 2025.
